div.style: width: 3px; height: 1.75rem; margin: 0 0.25rem; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #D55E00, #F0E442, #D55E00); animation: barPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;
width: 3px; height: 1.75rem; margin: 0 0.25rem; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #56B4E9, #0072B2, #56B4E9); animation: barPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: -0.5s;

span.style: font-size:0.8rem; color:#56B4E9; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; animation: textCycle 5s linear infinite;

div.style: font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:900; color:#2B9F78; margin-top:0.25rem; animation: glowPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(43,159,120,0.8);
font-size:0.75rem; color:#E69F00; font-weight:600; animation: textCycle 7s linear infinite;

span.style: font-size:0.8rem; color:#56B4E9; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; animation: textCycle 5s linear infinite; animation-delay: -1s;

div.style: font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:900; color:#56B4E9; margin-top:0.25rem; animation: glowPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: -0.5s; text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(86,180,233,0.6);
font-size:0.75rem; color:#CC79A7; font-weight:600; animation: textCycle 7s linear infinite; animation-delay: -2s;

span.style: font-size:0.8rem; color:#56B4E9; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; animation: textCycle 5s linear infinite; animation-delay: -2s;

font-size:0.75rem; padding:0.2rem 0.5rem; background-color:rgba(0,114,178,0.3); color:#56B4E9; border-radius:0.25rem; font-weight:800; border:2px solid #0072B2; animation: rainbowBorder 2s linear infinite;

font-size:0.75rem; padding:0.2rem 0.5rem; background-color:rgba(204,121,167,0.3); color:#CC79A7; border-radius:0.25rem; font-weight:800; border:2px solid #CC79A7; animation: rainbowBorder 2s linear infinite; animation-delay: -0.7s;

font-size:0.75rem; padding:0.2rem 0.5rem; background-color:rgba(43,159,120,0.3); color:#2B9F78; border-radius:0.25rem; font-weight:800; border:2px solid #2B9F78; animation: rainbowBorder 2s linear infinite; animation-delay: -1.4s;
font-size:0.8rem; color:#56B4E9; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; animation: textCycle 5s linear infinite; animation-delay: -3s;
font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:900; color:#F0E442; animation: glowPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: -1s;
font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:900; color:#D55E00; animation: glowPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(213,94,0,0.6);

div.style: height:0.625rem; background-color:rgba(213,94,0,0.15); border-radius:9999px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:0.25rem; border:2px solid #D55E00; animation: rainbowBorder 2s linear infinite;

width:49.1%; height:100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #D55E00, #E69F00, #F0E442, #2B9F78, #56B4E9); background-size: 200% 100%; border-radius:9999px; animation: bgShimmer 1.5s ease infinite, barPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;
